zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy verch Iestyn於大約1043年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根迪納斯 波斯時，她的父親Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg31歲，母親Ealfdy Angharad25歲。她於大約1963年與Einion ap Collwyn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy verch Iestyn于大约1043年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根迪納斯 波斯时，她的父亲Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg31岁，母亲Ealfdy Angharad25岁。她于大约1963年与Einion ap Collwyn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy verch Iestyn was born about 1043, in Dinas Powys, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg, was 31 and her mother, Ealfdy Angharad, was 25. She married Einion ap Collwyn about 1963, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.of Llantrissant, Glamorgan, Wales: Llantrisant, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy verch Iestyn est née environ 1043, à Dinas Powys, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ealfdy Angharad, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Einion ap Collwyn environ 1963, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy verch Iestyn um 1043 in Dinas Powys, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg 31 und ihre Mutter Ealfdy Angharad 25. Sie hat um 1963 in Wales Einion ap Collwyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy verch Iestyn è nata il circa 1043 nel Dinas Powys, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Ealfdy Angharad, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Einion ap Collwyn circa 1963, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy verch Iestynが約1043年にウェールズグラモーガンディナス ポウイスで生まれた時，父Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwgは31歳，母Ealfdy Angharadは25歳であった。約1963年にウェールズでEinion ap Collwynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy verch Iestyn(이)가 대략 1043년 웨일스 글램르건 딘아스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ealfdy Angharad(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1963년 웨일스에서 Einion ap Collwyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy verch Iestyn nasceu aproximadamente 1043, em Dinas Powys, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ealfdy Angharad, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Einion ap Collwyn aproximadamente 1963, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas.

ro.of Llantrissant, Glamorgan, Wales: Llantrisant, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy verch Iestyn родилась около 1043 г. в местности динас поуис, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ealfdy Angharad, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Einion ap Collwyn около 1963 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy verch Iestyn nació aproximadamente 1043, en Dinas Powys, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Iestyn ap Gwrgan of Morgannwg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ealfdy Angharad, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Einion ap Collwyn aproximadamente 1963, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
